claim: For 1024 rows of 32768-token logits with k=4 and temperature=0.8 on AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT gfx1201, block-level candidate merging and top-k reduction measured 14.049390x faster than the one-thread-per-row baseline using HIP-event timing only.
expected_profiler_signals: more parallel vocab scanning per row
curation_note: timing-only: HIP-event timings and correctness passed, but rocprofiler/rocprof counters were not collected because rocprof, rocprofv3, rocminfo, and rocm-smi were unavailable in this Windows venv environment. Do not generalize beyond this shape, toolchain, and gfx1201 target.
